parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1: Hello, Henbridge College. Can I help you?

Speaker 2: Hello, I saw a course on your website that I'm interested in. It was about creating jewellery. The thing is, though, I wasn't able to reserve a place. Are you able to help me with that?

Speaker 1: Certainly, I'll see what I can do. Do you know the course code, by any chance?

Speaker 2: Yes, it's JM309.

Speaker 1: Great, thank you. That makes it easier for me to find it on the system.

Speaker 2: Sure, that's why I made a note of it.

Speaker 1: OK, yes, I've found it here. That's the one on Thursday, isn't it? From 6.30 to 7.45?

Speaker 2: That's the one.

Speaker 1: Right, it's saying there aren't any places available, I'm afraid. That'll be why you couldn't book a place.

Speaker 2: Oh, that's a shame. What other evening courses are there?

Speaker 1: There's one called Working with Glass, which is very popular. Course WG891. Does that sound like something that might interest you?

Speaker 2: Maybe, but it depends what it is. I'm free every evening during the week, except Tuesday.

Speaker 1: Oh, right, that's when it is. From 5.45 until 7. And there are a few places, but I understand that wouldn't be possible for you. Is that right?

Speaker 2: I'm afraid so. We also run a pottery course, P168. That's every Friday, but it's earlier.

Speaker 2: Well, that might work, because I only work until 2 on Fridays. What time?

Speaker 1: It starts at quarter past 4 and runs until 5.30. There's still space if you're interested.

Speaker 2: Great, I'll take that place then, please.
